tools.name: quantitativePhenotype.getChartInfoUsingGet
tools.description: Return a list of quantitative phenotypes values based on a combination of Clinical Measurement, Experimental Condition, Rat Strain, and/or Measurement Method ontology terms.  Results will be all records that match all terms submitted.  Ontology ids should be submitted as a comma delimited list (ex. RS:0000029,CMO:0000155,CMO:0000139).  Species type is an integer value (3=rat, 4=chinchilla).  Reference RGD ID for a study works like a filter.

tools.name: quantitativePhenotype.getChartInfoUsingGet1
tools.description: Return a list of quantitative phenotypes values based on a combination of Clinical Measurement, Experimental Condition, Rat Strain, and/or Measurement Method ontology terms.  Results will be all records that match all terms submitted.  Ontology ids should be submitted as a comma delimited list (ex. RS:0000029,CMO:0000155,CMO:0000139).  Species type is an integer value (3=rat, 4=chinchilla)
